items.name: チョウセンアカシジミ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: A natural monument, the Chosen akashijimi (Korean hairstreak butterfly). Village-designated by Fudai Village on 1984-10-01. Located along the village's rivers and riverbanks.

items.name: 鵜鳥神社社夫婦杉
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.name_en: Married Couple Cedars of Unotori Shrine
en.description_en: A natural monument, a pair of cedar trees (meoto-sugi) at Unotori Shrine. Village-designated by Fudai Village on 1984-10-01. Located at Fudai Village 25-7.
